page.content: In the fiscal year 2024 report for 2U Inc, the Student-to-faculty ratios and Tuition revenue per student are detailed as follows: In the Student-to-faculty ratios table, the Undergraduate Programs section shows that the Business department has a StudentCount of 1,200, a FacultyCount of 80, and a Ratio of 15:1, with a Status of Active. The Engineering department reports a StudentCount of 900, a FacultyCount of 60, a Ratio of 15:1, and is also Active. The Humanities department has a StudentCount of 600, a FacultyCount of 40, a Ratio of 15:1, and is Active. Lastly, the Sciences department shows a StudentCount of 700, a FacultyCount of 50, a Ratio of 14:1, with Active status. The Tuition revenue table indicates that for 2024Q1, the Tuition Revenue is £25.5M, and the Net Income is £25.5M. In the 2024Q2, Tuition Revenue reaches £30.0M, with Net Income also at £30.0M.

page.content: The 2024Q3 reports Tuition Revenue of £28.8M and a Net Income of £28.8M. For 2024Q4, Tuition Revenue is £32.1M, with Net Income at £32.1M. The Total Revenue for the fiscal year sums to £116.4M, Total Costs amount to £95.2M, resulting in a Net Margin of 18.2%.
